title: Branch-3 overlay jitter from a flapping core LSP
symptom: Intermittent tunnel_loss_pct and tunnel_jitter_ms spikes on ce-br3 tunnel-hub, short BFD flaps, and an irregular tunnel_rekey_interval_s — all bursty rather than monotonic.
root_cause: A flapping label-switched path through core P-router p2 caused intermittent underlay loss for the IPSec/GRE overlay; a stuck IPSec SA then produced anomalous rekey intervals that compounded the micro-outages.
contributing_signals: tunnel_jitter_ms spikes correlated with loss bursts
resolution: Rerouted the LSP onto a healthy TE path avoiding p2 and triggered a controlled IPSec rekey to clear the stuck SA; loss and jitter returned to baseline and held. The faulty core link feeding p2 was scheduled for repair.

timeline.event: HST/COPOD on {loss,jitter,rekey} vector + stumpi discord fire on intermittent spikes.
Loss bursts correlated to LSP via p2 on the topology graph.
LSP reroute + controlled rekey approved and applied.
